series_metadata.series_description: Documents that serve to convey information of temporary importance, including but not limited to: phone messages, phone logs, post-it notes, calendars, facsimile coversheets, notes to convey information and for follow-up, drafts of documents upon which no official agency action is taken, routine correspondence, routine e-mail and routine voice mail.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: ALL: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Paper: ALL: Retain until no longer of adminsitrative value, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Trash
